description: setdar shorthand on Output (Wave 3 #15). Transcodes BBB_10sec.mp4 with the legacy SD anamorphic shape: scales to 720x576 (DV-PAL 4:3) and stamps DAR=4:3 on the output, which the runtime resolves to SAR 16:15 against the encoder's W/H and writes onto AVStream.codecpar.sample_aspect_ratio so downstream players display the correct 4:3 frame from a 720x576 raster. Mirrors ffmpeg -aspect 4:3.
